description.value:
Prerequisite: Dexterity 13, Dodge, Mobility, Point Blank Shot.

Benefit: When using an attack action with a ranged weapon, the character can move both before and after the attack, provided that the character's total distance moved is not greater than his or her base movement speed. Moving in this way does not provoke an attack of opportunity from the defender the character is attacking.
